title: RollerCoaster Tycoon 2
short_description: The acclaimed sequel — build bigger, wilder theme parks with new scenarios and tools.
description: RollerCoaster Tycoon 2 is the sequel to the landmark theme park management game by Chris Sawyer. Building on the original's success, RCT2 added new scenarios, ride types, a scenario editor, and expanded the scope of the parks players could create. Like its predecessor, it was written almost entirely in x86 assembly language and became a bestseller, further cementing the franchise as a classic of the management simulation genre.
